actions.disclaimer_text: The AI is a decision-making aid and is not infallible. Always verify the packaging when in doubt.

choice.title: New analysis
choice.subtitle: Choose the image source
choice.no_credits_desc: Recharge in a few clicks and regain peace of mind: decoded labels, identified allergens. Your credits never expire.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle_ambiguous: Understands the doubt, then prepares useful phrases.
assistant.subtitle_allergen: Explains the blocker, then prepares a safer next step.
assistant.subtitle_mixed: Explains the blocker, then also highlights what still needs checking.
assistant.inline_description_ambiguous: Explains the doubt and prepares store phrases.
assistant.inline_description_allergen: Explains why the product is blocked and helps you ask for a safer alternative.
assistant.inline_description_mixed: Explains what already blocks the product and what still needs clarification in store.
assistant.preview_title: What the AI Assistant will prepare
assistant.preview_body_ambiguous: Quick analysis, what to verify, then cards in your language, Japanese, and romaji.
assistant.preview_body_allergen: Straight to the point: blocker explained, best things to ask, then cards to help you move to a safer option.
assistant.preview_body_mixed: First what already blocks the product, then what still needs checking, with ready-to-show cards for the store.
assistant.intro_note: The analysis stays on demand. It uses your ambiguous scan and active allergens to prepare useful in-store phrases.
assistant.loading: The AI Assistant is preparing the analysis and useful store phrases...
assistant.loading_stage_reason: Understand the doubt and the sensitive points
assistant.error_generic: Unable to prepare store assistance for this scan.
assistant.audio_error: Unable to play the audio for this phrase.

decision_reading.title: Decision-first reading
decision_reading.description: We focus on what truly changes the verdict, like allergens, dashi or alcohol, instead of just repeating the label.

conbini_translation.title: Actually useful travel translation
conbini_translation.description: We turn Japanese label shorthand and retail jargon into action-ready guidance on what you can eat or avoid.

travel_zero_surprises.title: Travel mode: zero surprises
travel_zero_surprises.description: If an ingredient may hide something you avoid, like an extract, flavouring or seasoning, we surface it first.

ambiguity_flagged.title: Ambiguous means flagged, not guessed
ambiguity_flagged.description: When the label stays vague, such as 香料, 調味料 or エキス, we mark it for review instead of inventing certainty.

quick_recheck_memory.title: A quick memory for next time
quick_recheck_memory.description: The scan keeps the photo and decoded version so you can recheck the same product in seconds later on.

vertical_micro_labels.title: Vertical text and tiny notes included
vertical_micro_labels.description: Critical information is sometimes hidden in side notes, vertical text or factory remarks. We scan those too.

critical_headings.title: The right headings, right away
critical_headings.description: We quickly spot 原材料名 for ingredients, 添加物 for additives, アレルゲン and factory notes like 本品製造工場では…

allergens_ground_reality.title: Allergens: regulation and reality
allergens_ground_reality.description: We highlight required allergens, but also the ones that often show up through traces and cross-contamination in Japan.

often_missed_allergens.title: The allergens people miss most
often_missed_allergens.description: We also watch for sesame, soy and tree nuts even when they are buried inside long ingredient lists.

hidden_parentheses.title: Parentheses often hide the real story
hidden_parentheses.description: Sauces, tare and seasonings are often expanded inside parentheses. We open them up and list everything.

hidden_dashi_extracts.title: Dashi and hidden extracts
hidden_dashi_extracts.description: We detect だし, エキス, powders and seafood bases to avoid the classic trap of a product that looks vegetarian but is not.

hidden_pork_derivatives.title: Subtle pork derivatives
hidden_pork_derivatives.description: We look for lard, gelatin, pork extract and similar hidden ingredients often buried in extracts or seasonings.

hidden_alcohol_seasoning.title: Alcohol hidden as seasoning
hidden_alcohol_seasoning.description: Mirin, cooking sake or alcohol can sit behind 調味料 or 調味液. We isolate them clearly.

gluten_beyond_wheat.title: Gluten goes beyond 小麦
gluten_beyond_wheat.description: We also watch for malt, barley and ingredients where wheat is only implicit, such as some soy sauces or broth bases.

milk_tripwire.title: Milk: the common tripwire trio
milk_tripwire.description: We surface milk components, whey and lactose separately to avoid false dairy-free assumptions.

seafood_indirect_signals.title: Seafood: indirect signals matter
seafood_indirect_signals.description: Beyond shrimp and crab, we also detect shellfish, fish and oyster extracts that can still matter.

soba_red_flag.title: Soba gets an immediate red flag
soba_red_flag.description: Buckwheat can appear in snacks, sauces or factory traces, so we push it to the top when it shows up.

peanut_and_nuts.title: Peanut and nuts clearly separated
peanut_and_nuts.description: We recognise the Japanese variants and clearly distinguish peanuts from tree nuts.

industrial_umami.title: Industrial umami, decoded
industrial_umami.description: We flag amino-acid blends and nucleotide-based flavour enhancers to make taste additives easier to read.

additives_by_role.title: Additives grouped by purpose
additives_by_role.description: Instead of one endless list, we group additives by job: preservatives, colourings, emulsifiers and acidifiers.

polyols_warning.title: Polyols: a gut warning
polyols_warning.description: While travelling, xylitol, sorbitol or maltitol can surprise you. We highlight them when they appear.

trace_factory_language.title: Factory trace wording recognised
trace_factory_language.description: We interpret factory language like 同一ライン or 本品製造工場では… and rewrite it clearly.

gmo_wording.title: GMO wording without confusion
gmo_wording.description: GMO and traceability labels do not all mean the same thing. We turn them into plain English.

manufacturer_contact.title: Manufacturer and contact details as backup
manufacturer_contact.description: We extract brand, factory, importer and contact details when present so you have a safety net if you need to verify.

japanese_dates.title: Japanese dates, clearly read
japanese_dates.description: We distinguish quality dates from safety dates and read Japanese date formats without ambiguity.

salt_equivalent.title: Useful salt data: 食塩相当量
salt_equivalent.description: We surface salt equivalent when it is present, because it is often the most readable nutrition number in Japan.

multiple_scripts.title: One ingredient, three scripts
multiple_scripts.description: The same ingredient may appear in kanji, kana or katakana. We unify them so your filters stay reliable.

catch_all_words.title: Catch-all words under the microscope
catch_all_words.description: When a broad term may hide fish, alcohol or animal-derived ingredients, we say it explicitly.

conbini_plan_b.title: A real conbini backup plan
conbini_plan_b.description: If a product looks borderline, we help you lean toward categories that are usually more transparent.

frequent_products_cache.title: Faster recognition for repeat products
frequent_products_cache.description: We speed up common travel staples like onigiri, cup noodles and snacks without giving up accuracy.

photo_guidance.title: If the photo is messy, we guide you
photo_guidance.description: If the picture is blurry or off-target, we remind you which area matters most: ingredients and factory notes, not front-of-pack marketing.

final_verdict.title: Final verdict: coherence first
final_verdict.description: We cross-check everything against your allergen profile and restrictions, with safety first when information is missing.
